author: Omar Vema
body: no tiene la opcion de omni de editar video como la exposicion de google omni , no vale la pena , es solo un dreamina con el modelo de generacion de imagenes 3.1 de google , nada del otro mundo , nisiquiera , seedance 2.0 es tan malo para la edicion de videos y gratuito e ilimitado ademas de nada me sirve ser google ai pro si solo con generar 1 video ya se acaba la cuota y obliga a comprar creditos. prefiero descargar modelos generadores de imagenes como estable difussion y generarlas yo mismo.
raw_json: {"reviewId": "5f329ab2-845a-401c-b5c3-70981acac950", "userName": "Omar Vema", "userImage": "https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOeLC-BMPPmu-DVdE70rvv6qVIAYKl8OVTin2LmWemwNta8Co", "content": "no tiene la opcion de omni de editar video como la exposicion de google omni , no vale la pena , es solo un dreamina con el modelo de generacion de imagenes 3.1 de google , nada del otro mundo , nisiquiera , seedance 2.0 es tan malo para la edicion de videos y gratuito e ilimitado ademas de nada me sirve ser google ai pro si solo con generar 1 video ya se acaba la cuota y obliga a comprar creditos. prefiero descargar modelos generadores de imagenes como estable difussion y generarlas yo mismo.", "score": 1, "thumbsUpCount": 0, "reviewCreatedVersion": "1.434.9", "at": "2026-05-24 19:23:46", "replyContent": null, "repliedAt": null, "appVersion": "1.434.9"}
body_en: It doesn't have the omni option to edit video like the Google Omni demo. Not worth it - it's just a Dreamina with Google's image generation 3.1, nothing special. Not even Seedance 2.0 is so bad. Also no point being Google AI Pro if generating 1 video uses up the quota and forces you to buy credits. I prefer to download generative image models like Stable Diffusion and generate them myself.

body_en: The safety filter system for text, video and Thai Text-to-Speech is set too strict and lacks context. It can't distinguish between drama/social creative content vs real-life threats. The system blocks common words like legal references, sharp dialogue in plays, or investigative scene simulations. Result: content creators have a very bad experience and can't continue using the system. Please urgently improve the algorithm.

author: Titilayo Ajose
body: initially loved the simple interface with buttons bold,easily accessible. The enter button gives room for addition of more words rather than sending the video for generation. This seems like a lot of improvement but unfortunately, no room to extend making it impossible to generate consistent characters. Sometimes it brings up not allowed in your region. And the worst is that it does not follow your prompts. People walk through doors like ghosts, climb chairs to get out of a room. It acts crazy

author: Roselene Bueno
body: horrível, O aplicativo ficou péssimo depois das últimas atualizações. Antes a ferramenta era ótima porque tinha a opção simples de "Extend video" (estender o vídeo), o que permitia continuar a história mantendo a mesma cena e o mesmo personagem.​Agora que removeram essa função para forçar esse sistema horrível de criar cenas separadas, ficou impossível de usar! ia não tem consistência nenhuma: você cria a primeira cena com uma personagem japonesa e, na cena seguinte, ela é uma india
raw_json: {"reviewId": "e58b90a8-f1dc-492a-adad-24817a12a5ea", "userName": "Roselene Bueno", "userImage": "https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWYSjPz9L7mawxuGFT_l1twEHUtEtQQ0wNTks98jWQPcPDDDJ65Ng", "content": "horrível, O aplicativo ficou péssimo depois das últimas atualizações. Antes a ferramenta era ótima porque tinha a opção simples de \"Extend video\" (estender o vídeo), o que permitia continuar a história mantendo a mesma cena e o mesmo personagem.​Agora que removeram essa função para forçar esse sistema horrível de criar cenas separadas, ficou impossível de usar! ia não tem consistência nenhuma: você cria a primeira cena com uma personagem japonesa e, na cena seguinte, ela é uma india", "score": 1, "thumbsUpCount": 1, "reviewCreatedVersion": "1.434.9", "at": "2026-05-23 04:45:12", "replyContent": null, "repliedAt": null, "appVersion": "1.434.9"}
body_en: horrible, the app got terrible after the latest updates. Before, the tool was great because it had the simple Extend Video option which allowed continuing the story keeping the same scene and character. Now they removed that function to force this horrible system of creating separate scenes, impossible to use! AI has no consistency: you create the first scene with a Japanese character and in the next scene she's an Indian

author: Victor Hagane
body: The safety filters are extremely restrictive. I am trying to create some Cyberpunk style anime characters for a SFW comic I'm writing for myself in order to exercise my English writing. Their outfits aren't very revealing but yet, if a little skin is visible on the legs for example, or the outfit is tight your useless safety filters automatically think the character is underage, a prominent person, A REAL PERSON. HOW AN ANIME CHARACTER CAN BE A REAL PERSON?? All my characters are over 23.
raw_json: {"reviewId": "205a6104-e551-4eee-82e7-d7e1202df08a", "userName": "Victor Hagane", "userImage": "https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLlXTigzUL_lQkgWICFBXFpnCREqTuMMMkY7jpzzbGi72sK=mo", "content": "The safety filters are extremely restrictive. All my characters are over 23.", "score": 1, "thumbsUpCount": 2, "reviewCreatedVersion": "1.434.9", "at": "2026-05-23 01:30:56", "replyContent": null, "repliedAt": null, "appVersion": "1.434.9"}
body_en: The safety filters are extremely restrictive. I am trying to create some Cyberpunk style anime characters for a SFW comic. Their outfits aren't very revealing but if a little skin is visible the safety filters automatically think the character is underage or a real person. HOW CAN AN ANIME CHARACTER BE A REAL PERSON? All my characters are over 23.

author: sakshi pote
body: this app is not worth a penny. I brought a subscription of 399 thinking I would finally be able to make video using ai. I was so happy, so much. I didn't knew about the credits and all. the app never mentioned it, not even while the payment. and suddenly the credits ended and I couldn't make anything anymore. I lost my 400 for nothing. I am so disappointed and so angry. atleast they should give the subscriber a month free to make however much videos they want. even if they reduce alittle quality

author: 扶苏
body: B站橘鸭一报道，我就立马直接在谷歌商店搜索就出来了，我才是第一，全体目光向我看齐，看我看我，我宣布个事 我才是第一个发现的，全都给我点赞，都听到没有（因为我的心情和思想千奇百怪，现在只要是我是第一个发现的应用，你们不给我点赞，我心里不舒服，如果你们看到了这个括号里面话，影响了你们的心情和想法，让你们不舒服，都点踩也可以，但是还是求求各位的点赞，让你们和其他人看到这个应用的介绍，往下滑/点击查看其他评论进去后能看到我的评论在三个评论/点赞多的评论排在前面，当然点击右上角选择最新的评论，自己机型的评论，还有一个功能我好像有点忘记。的其中一个，顺序其实无所谓，谢谢各位看到这个评论的人了）。最后这个应用我也没怎么用，但是我觉得看了B 站关于谷歌 IO 大会的介绍和讲解，我估计这个应用还是比不上字节的东西，具体是什么东西，我也点忘记了。

author: Brilliane Balcarse
body: Hello Google Flow Team, I would like to report an issue with the image-to-video feature in the beta app. When I upload a picture and generate a video, the final result often changes the original character too much. The face, body, clothes, style, or overall appearance sometimes become completely different from the uploaded image. The main problem is character consistency and image preservation. The generated video should stay closer to the original uploaded photo.
raw_json: {"reviewId": "4127f47c-dfb8-4851-a43d-93499d63a32d", "userName": "Brilliane Balcarse", "userImage": "https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQWzeBrIk5PPcnoxUegt8eDpZWsa1aXmAilf8o5pFYjzk0Ew=mo", "content": "Hello Google Flow Team, I would like to report an issue with the image-to-video feature in the beta app. When I upload a picture and generate a video, the final result often changes the original character too much. The generated video should stay closer to the original uploaded photo.", "score": 4, "thumbsUpCount": 2, "reviewCreatedVersion": "1.434.9", "at": "2026-05-22 04:43:55", "replyContent": null, "repliedAt": null, "appVersion": "1.434.9"}
body_en: Hello Google Flow Team, I would like to report an issue with the image-to-video feature in the beta app. When I upload a picture and generate a video, the final result often changes the original character too much. The face, body, clothes, style, or overall appearance sometimes become completely different from the uploaded image. The main problem is character consistency and image preservation. The generated video should stay closer to the original uploaded photo.

author: Pravin Roy
body: The latest update completely ruined Google Flow AI. Before, it was simple, smooth, and perfect for creators. The “What happen next” feature made long videos seamless and cinematic. Image-to-video was easy and beginner-friendly. Now the UI is confusing, messy, and frustrating. Even downloading often fails. Please properly review this update and bring back the old interface and workflow. The previous version was far better and much more creator-friendly.

body_en: The latest update completely ruined Google Flow AI. Before, it was simple, smooth, and perfect for creators. The What Happens Next feature made long videos seamless and cinematic. Image-to-video was easy and beginner-friendly. Now the UI is confusing, messy, and frustrating. Even downloading often fails. Please review this update and bring back the old interface and workflow.

author: Ifunanya Acholonu-Okoroafor
body: I was waiting for this app, but so far, the rendering is poor. It doesn’t understand prompts, and generates videos completely different from the image. You finally included an 'Animate' feature. But you removed the Extend feature, a very key feature which helps to seemlessly blend clips together. Kindly replace it. Also, please add and activate the other features like Remove and Insert, which were not working in the Flow page.

body_en: I was waiting for this app, but so far, the rendering is poor. It doesn't understand prompts, and generates videos completely different from the image. Also, please add and activate the other features like Remove and Insert, which were not working in the Flow page.

author: Tiger Lin
body: Google Flow currently only supports a 1K photo generator, which feels far less practical than working on a desktop. When trying to generate front, back, side, or top-down views from an original image, the system often produces completely unrelated results. I attempted multiple times, but the outputs consistently failed. Since the 5/19/2026 update, the performance has become even worse to the point that the feature is essentially unusable.
raw_json: {"reviewId": "4a2d76d6-2e46-4898-b483-aa45b220e610", "userName": "Tiger Lin", "userImage": "https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGVheLivbzqisHRFoBO_vHxezfMw1KzmGxFGa6GSCsUgy7QccL", "content": "Google Flow currently only supports a 1K photo generator, which feels far less practical than working on a desktop. When trying to generate front, back, side, or top-down views from an original image, the system often produces completely unrelated results. I attempted multiple times, but the outputs consistently failed. Since the 5/19/2026 update, the performance has become even worse to the point that the feature is essentially unusable.", "score": 2, "thumbsUpCount": 1, "reviewCreatedVersion": null, "at": "2026-05-20 20:59:38", "replyContent": null, "repliedAt": null, "appVersion": null}
body_en: Google Flow currently only supports a 1K photo generator, which feels far less practical than working on a desktop. When trying to generate front, back, side, or top-down views from an original image, the system often produces completely unrelated results. I attempted multiple times, but the outputs consistently failed. Since the 5/19/2026 update, the performance has become even worse to the point that the feature is essentially unusable.

author: Carlos Ezequiel machado
body: Pontos positivos: ​Imagens geradas (como a do gato realista e estilo dark) ficam excelentes. ​A animação de imagem única funciona muito bem. ​O modo "Take a photo" melhora bem os resultados. ​Pontos negativos: ​A geração de vídeos e movimentos é ruim e artificial. ​A voz da IA é extremamente robótica. ​O aplicativo apresenta muitos bugs frequentes durante o uso.
raw_json: {"reviewId": "511d2831-5d25-4513-ac69-a567a92f1ba5", "userName": "Carlos Ezequiel machado", "userImage": "https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPpx7WgjxWPho-yOXMIjt_b_J6RnVQGgANvjwxQgzbaCJuuTnf", "content": "Pontos positivos: ​Imagens geradas (como a do gato realista e estilo dark) ficam excelentes. ​A animação de imagem única funciona muito bem. ​O modo \"Take a photo\" melhora bem os resultados. ​Pontos negativos: ​A geração de vídeos e movimentos é ruim e artificial. ​A voz da IA é extremamente robótica. ​O aplicativo apresenta muitos bugs frequentes durante o uso.", "score": 4, "thumbsUpCount": 2, "reviewCreatedVersion": "1.434.9", "at": "2026-05-20 19:46:23", "replyContent": null, "repliedAt": null, "appVersion": "1.434.9"}
body_en: Positive points: Images generated (like the realistic cat and dark style) are excellent. Single image animation works very well. Take a photo mode improves the results well. Negative points: Video and motion generation is bad and artificial. AI voice is extremely robotic. App has many frequent bugs during use.

author: Ai Intelligence
body: Google Flow Beta is an amazing AI creative app with a clean and user-friendly interface. The AI generates impressive visuals and cinematic content quickly and accurately from simple prompts. It is fast, smooth, and very useful for creators, designers, and content makers. Although there are a few minor bugs because it is still in beta, the overall experience is excellent. Google has huge potential with this app, and future updates could make it one of the best AI creative tools available.

author: shoaib ansari
body: Promising tool, but needs refinement "Google Flow has a lot of potential for streamlining workflows, and I appreciate the clean interface. The integration capabilities are quite smooth, which makes it easy to set up basic tasks. However, I’ve noticed some latency issues during complex operations, and it can be a bit overwhelming for new users to navigate the advanced settings. It’s a good start, but I’m looking forward to more stability and perhaps some more intuitive tutorials in the upcoming!
raw_json: {"reviewId": "28a1600b-105d-461f-be26-c21b04306685", "userName": "shoaib ansari", "userImage": "https://play-lh.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUJ6mL9pGI0cRvZl61opJEgiK_WytR5vS7YiwbfyF0KGwSZzMeJw", "content": "Promising tool, but needs refinement \"Google Flow has a lot of potential for streamlining workflows, and I appreciate the clean interface. The integration capabilities are quite smooth, which makes it easy to set up basic tasks. However, I’ve noticed some latency issues during complex operations, and it can be a bit overwhelming for new users to navigate the advanced settings. It’s a good start, but I’m looking forward to more stability and perhaps some more intuitive tutorials in the upcoming!", "score": 4, "thumbsUpCount": 2, "reviewCreatedVersion": "1.434.9", "at": "2026-05-20 12:40:59", "replyContent": null, "repliedAt": null, "appVersion": "1.434.9"}
body_en: Promising tool, but needs refinement. Google Flow has a lot of potential for streamlining workflows, and I appreciate the clean interface. The integration capabilities are quite smooth, which makes it easy to set up basic tasks. However, I've noticed some latency issues during complex operations, and it can be a bit overwhelming for new users to navigate the advanced settings. It's a good start, but I'm looking forward to more stability and perhaps some more intuitive tutorials in the upcoming!

body: AI creators के लिए एक next-level creative app है। इसका smooth interface, powerful AI video generation, cinematic scene creation और fast rendering इसे बाकी AI apps से अलग बनाते हैं। खास बात यह है कि यह beginners और professional creators दोनों के लिए आसान है। Mobile और desktop sync, real-time notifications और advanced editing tools content creation को बेहद आसान बना देते हैं। हालांकि यह अभी Beta version

body_en: This is a next-level creative app for AI creators. Its smooth interface, powerful AI video generation, cinematic scene creation and fast rendering set it apart from other AI apps. Special: it's easy for beginners and pros. Mobile-desktop sync, real-time notifications, advanced editing tools make content creation very easy. Although it's still Beta.

body_en: App is too poor, can't upload multiple images at once, can't see image names, very inconvenient and slow. I use phone, operations on web are faster and more convenient than this app. I often upload multiple images at once to reference for multiple videos (app only uploads one at a time, exhausting). I see image names (numbered) faster than identifying images (app doesn't show image names). App forces me to do work that wasn't needed on web.
